name: Funnel — Systematic Review Screening with Exact Numbers
input: Show a systematic review screening funnel with precise numbers: 12,847 Records Identified, 3,291 Duplicates Removed, 9,556 Title/Abstract Screened, 847 Full-Text Assessed, 234 Studies Included, 89 in Meta-Analysis.
qualityCriteria: No placeholder or lorem ipsum content
napkinBenchmark: Funnel narrowing from 12,847 at the top to 89 at the bottom. Each stage shows the count prominently.

data.title: Systematic Review Screening Funnel

items.label: Records Identified
items.description: Database searching across PubMed, Embase, Cochrane, Web of Science

items.label: Title/Abstract Screened
items.description: Two independent reviewers applied inclusion criteria

items.label: Full-Text Assessed
items.description: Retrieved and assessed for eligibility against detailed criteria

items.label: Studies Included
items.description: Met all inclusion criteria for qualitative synthesis

items.label: In Meta-Analysis
items.description: Provided sufficient data for quantitative pooling

data.caption: PRISMA-compliant screening flow from identification to meta-analysis inclusion
